context.game: Pico Echo - virtual pet cockatiel simulation
context.role: Visual indicator around Echo when in dirty state
context.screen_position: Spawns around Echo at random positions within 5px radius of (64, 60)
context.usage_scenario: Spawns periodically when Echo is in dirty state (3+ poop items), subtle ambient effect

animation.description: Frames 1-6: dust pixel appears, drifts slowly 2-3px in random direction, fades in final 2 frames

visual_specification.details: Gray dust (#C2C3C7) 1x1px, spawns every 1 second during dirty state, 3-4 dust particles visible at once, each drifts 2-3px in random direction over 2 seconds, very subtle effect

relationships.shared_with: All particle effects share temporary display behavior
relationships.differences_from: sparkle_particle (opposite context - dirty vs clean), all other particles (smallest size)

explicit_negations: No stink lines or smell indicators
